# TeamPrompt

> TeamPrompt is an AI prompt management platform with built-in data loss prevention (DLP) for teams using ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, and Perplexity. It provides shared prompt libraries, quality guidelines, security scanning, and usage analytics through a browser extension and web dashboard.

TeamPrompt helps organizations manage how their teams use AI tools. It combines a centralized prompt library with enterprise-grade security features including real-time DLP scanning, audit logging, and compliance controls for healthcare, legal, finance, government, and technology teams.

## Product
- [Features](https://teamprompt.app/features): Core product features and capabilities
- [Pricing](https://teamprompt.app/pricing): Plans — Free, Pro ($9/mo), Team ($7/user/mo), Business ($12/user/mo)
- [Security](https://teamprompt.app/security): Data protection, DLP scanning, and compliance
- [Enterprise](https://teamprompt.app/enterprise): Enterprise features, SSO, and deployment
- [Integrations](https://teamprompt.app/integrations): Supported AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Perplexity
- [Extensions](https://teamprompt.app/extensions): Browser extension for Chrome, Edge, and Firefox

## Industries
- [Healthcare](https://teamprompt.app/industries/healthcare): HIPAA-ready AI prompt management
- [Legal](https://teamprompt.app/industries/legal): Client data protection for law firms
- [Technology](https://teamprompt.app/industries/technology): Source code and API key protection
- [Finance](https://teamprompt.app/industries/finance): Financial data compliance
- [Government](https://teamprompt.app/industries/government): CUI and FedRAMP-aligned controls
- [Education](https://teamprompt.app/industries/education): FERPA-ready student data protection
- [Insurance](https://teamprompt.app/industries/insurance): Claims and PII protection

## Documentation
- [Help Center](https://teamprompt.app/help): Getting started guides and documentation
- [Getting Started](https://teamprompt.app/help/getting-started): Create workspace, invite team, install extension
- [Prompt Library](https://teamprompt.app/help/prompt-library): Create, edit, share, and version prompts
- [Security Rules](https://teamprompt.app/help/security-rules): DLP scanning, custom rules, compliance packs
- [Team Management](https://teamprompt.app/help/team-management): Roles, permissions, directory sync

## Solutions
- [Solutions Hub](https://teamprompt.app/solutions): Use cases, comparisons, guides, and templates
- [AI Governance](https://teamprompt.app/solutions/ai-governance): Enterprise AI governance platform
- [DLP for AI](https://teamprompt.app/solutions/dlp-for-ai-tools): Data loss prevention for AI tools
- [Prompt Management](https://teamprompt.app/solutions/prompt-management-101): Guide to prompt management
